Title: XMLType.createSchemaBasedXML
Description: Returns a copy of the given instance with new schema reference.

The function creates a new instance of XMLType by copying the given one and assigning a new schema URL to it.
    	Parameter schema_url specifies a new URL; if it is omitted then a non-schema based instance is created like
    	the XMLType.createNonSchemaBasedXML() function.

The returned copy has an internal "validated" flag set to 0, even if the new URL is equal to the URL of the
    	original instance.
